motivation: Addresses critique: 'All benchmarks are researcher-written models, not production ML code.'
complexity_features: Reshape/view operations (DCGAN generator, VGG classifier, SE block)

per_benchmark.name: unet_skip_bug
per_benchmark.details: Shape mismatch at self.dec1_conv1: input has 128 channels but layer expects 256

per_benchmark.name: vgg_classifier_bug
per_benchmark.details: Sequential sub-layer _seq_0: Linear expects last dim=25088, got 49

per_benchmark.details:
CounterexampleTrace(DCGANGenerator)
  Failing step: 0
  Concrete dims: {'batch': 1}
  VIOLATION [0]: Linear out_features unknown
